channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: France bans far-right Israeli minister Ben-Gvir over abuse of activists
item.description: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noel Barrot said France would not tolerate its nationals being threatened or intimidated.

item.title: Israeli air strike pounds southern Lebanon leaving many injured
item.description: An Israeli air strike has hit the Al-Baqbouq area north of Tyre in southern Lebanon.

item.title: The pollution that outlives war
item.description: Long after fighting is over, the toxic leftovers of war continue to poison communities and the environment.

item.title: DR Congo will not change World Cup preparations despite US Ebola warning
item.description: World Cup cohosts United States have warned Democratic Republic of the Congo team to isolate due to Ebola fears.

item.title: F1 legend Prost suffers head injury in alleged robbery at Swiss home
item.description: Former Formula 1 champion Alain Prost reportedly injured as police investigate robbery at family home in Switzerland.

item.title: Massive fire engulfs residential area in the Philippine capital
item.description: A massive fire is tearing through a densely-populated neighbourhood in Manila.

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party’s founder says Indian government took website down
item.description: Group’s creator says his Instagram page was also hacked, along with the movement’s account.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Haiti fans feel excluded from first tournament since 1974
item.description: Expensive tickets and transport prices and a US travel ban mean few Haitians will be able to attend the matches.

item.title: Uganda confirms three new Ebola cases, bringing total to five
item.description: The new cases include a driver who transported the country's first ⁠confirmed patient and a ​health worker.

item.title: China coal mine blast kills at least 90, leaves nine missing
item.description: A gas explosion at the Liushenyu coal mine in China’s Shanxi province has killed at least 90 workers.

item.title: Man Utd’s Fernandes trumps Arsenal to Premier League player of season award
item.description: Arsenal's Gabriel, David Raya and Declan Rice, and Man City's Erling Haaland and Antoine Semenyo, pipped to EPL award.

item.title: Senegal’s President Faye sacks PM Sonko and dissolves government
item.description: The renewed instability could complicate bailout negotiations with the International Monetary Fund.

item.title: Senegal’s President Faye sacks PM Sonko as deepening rift erupts
item.description: Supporters of Senegal’s ousted prime minister have rallied outside his home in Dakar.

item.title: Zelenskyy says ‘time is right’ for Ukraine to start process of joining EU
item.description: His comments come as Russia accuses Ukraine of killing 12 in an attack on a college.

item.title: Kohli refuses Head handshake after heated Hyderabad-Bengaluru clash in IPL
item.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad beat Virat Kohli's Royal ​Challengers Bengaluru by 55 runs, leaving former India captain fuming.

item.title: Israeli attacks in Lebanon kill at least 2 despite supposed ceasefire
item.description: People in southern Lebanon are living under "psychological terror" from Israeli air attacks and displacement orders.

item.title: Mexico beat Ghana as World Cup cohosts excel despite FIFA sanctions
item.description: Parts of the Puebla stadium for high-profile warm-up for 2026 edition were closed to spectators due to FIFA sanctions.

item.title: Missiles to munitions: Does the US risk running out of key weapons?
item.description: The US projects confidence in weapons stockpiles, but analysts say dwindling munitions are shaping its war decisions.

item.title: As Salah plays final Liverpool match, his legacy goes far beyond the pitch
item.description: Mohamed Salah's status as one of Liverpool's greatest players of all time transcends his achievements in the sport.

item.title: Failing chemical tank forces thousands to evacuate in Southern California
item.description: Firefighters were able to reduce the tank’s temperature, buying crews more time to stabilise the situation.

item.title: North Korean women’s team win Asian Champions League title in South Korea
item.description: Naegohyang Women's FC beat Tokyo Verdy Beleza 1-0 amid rare visit to South Korea to play in tournament.

item.title: Diplomacy intensifies to seek peace deal between US and Iran
item.description: A visit by Pakistan’s army chief to Tehran is seen as a sign of significant progress in negotiations.

item.title: Not just the US: India to Brazil, 51 nations armed Israel amid Gaza war
item.description: Despite ICJ genocide warnings, 51 nations kept arming Israel, even after pledging to halt support.

item.title: Gas explosion at Chinese coal mine kills at least 90
item.description: President Xi Jinping has called on authorities nationwide to learn from the incident.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Which star players will miss the tournament?
item.description: Al Jazeera takes a look at the high-profile players who will play no part in the tournament in North America.
